note: CHILD stage. An internal scheduler tick about a school-age child's disrupted sleep. STAGE GUARD: sleep_pattern_signal / feeding_pattern_signal are infant/newborn-only signals (per classifier.md + the child pack) and must NOT fire for a 9-year-old. Hand-derived: the safe classification for a developmental sleep observation at this stage is age_stage_milestone_due (a stage-appropriate developmental note) or unclassified — anything but the infant signals. eventTypeOneOf encodes 'NOT the infant signal'.

input.rawContent: {"trigger":"sleep_observation","child_age_months":108,"note":"logged shorter overnight sleep and later bedtimes across the past two weeks for the 9-year-old"}
